files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "name": string;
  "email": string;
  "country": string;
  "spent": number;
  "status": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Customers",
  "description": "Choose how many rows to display per page.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 10,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "showPageSizeSelector": true,
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": false,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": false,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "name",
      "label": "Customer",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "email",
      "label": "Email",
      "type": "email",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "country",
      "label": "Country",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "spent",
      "label": "Total Spent",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Active": "default",
        "Trial": "secondary",
        "Churned": "outline"
      }
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
